summary: ANDROID 🟥 CLOUD Unable to remove policies for VFRee 60 + device
scenario: VFree 60+ device not appearing in Manage > Policies > Individual Device list, preventing policy removal
description_clean: When logging into a tenant, the VFree 60+ device is not shown in Manage -> Policies -> Individual Device list, preventing users from setting or removing policies for that device. The device appears in the inventory, but from there users can only set policies, not remove them. Expected behavior is that the VFree 60+ device should appear in the Individual Device list under Policies, allowing both setting and removal of policies.
steps: Navigate to Manage -> Policies -> Individual Device list.
Observe the list of devices displayed.
Check if the VFree 60+ device appears in the list.
If not visible, navigate to the inventory to confirm the device exists.
Attempt to set a policy from the inventory (if possible).
Attempt to remove a policy from the inventory (if possible).
expected: The VFree 60+ device should appear in the Individual Device list under Manage -> Policies, allowing users to both set and remove policies for that device.
actual: The VFree 60+ device is not shown in Manage -> Policies -> Individual Device list. It appears in the inventory, but from there users can only set policies, not remove them.
